topHoldingsInfo: The 10 largest individual companies you own across all your active ETFs, aggregated by their proportional weight.
concentrationInfo: A cumulative sum of your top 50 holdings. Helps identify if your portfolio is top-heavy (e.g., your top 5 stocks making up 30% of your net worth).
distributionInfo: Groups your underlying stocks by their individual size. Determines if you hold a few large positions vs thousands of tiny fractional positions.
